archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) adapted for High-Contrast Mobile

Button.primary: Pill-shaped (borderRadius: 9999), paddingVertical: 16, paddingHorizontal: 24, flexDirection: 'row', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center'. Bold text.
Button.secondary: Same as primary but backgroundColor is surface, borderWidth: 1, borderColor: border, text is text_primary.

Card.container: borderRadius: 24, padding: 24, backgroundColor: surface, use shadow_sm.
Card.header: Row layout, flex wrap, bold titles.

Input.container: borderRadius: 16, backgroundColor: surface_alt, paddingHorizontal: 16, paddingVertical: 14, borderWidth: 1, borderColor: border, fontSize: 16, color: text_primary

ChatBubble.user: backgroundColor: primary, borderBottomRightRadius: 4, borderRadius: 20, padding: 16, color: primary_foreground.

layout_strategy.header: paddingTop: 48 (safe area), paddingBottom: 16, paddingHorizontal: 24, flexDirection: 'row', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center'
layout_strategy.bottom_tab_bar: backgroundColor: surface, borderTopWidth: 1, borderColor: border, height: 80, paddingBottom: 20

motion_and_interactions.button_press: Use TouchableOpacity with activeOpacity={0.7} or Pressable with scale down animation to 0.96.
motion_and_interactions.list_items: Staggered fade-in on load using Reanimated or LayoutAnimation.
motion_and_interactions.check_task: Haptic feedback (ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light) + scale bounce on the checkmark icon.
motion_and_interactions.screen_transitions: Native modal slides or custom fade-through for non-tab screens.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native mobile application. Do NOT use HTML tags (like <div> or <span>) or Tailwind className props.
Use only React Native primitive components (View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, FlatList).
Use StyleSheet.create() for all styling. You can create a ThemeContext to supply light/dark mode colors dynamically.
Incorporate the colors, spacing (xs to 2xl), and radii (sm to pill) directly into your styles.
When displaying the AI (May) in chat, use the provided ai_avatar image URL.
For user action feedback, utilize React Native's standard TouchableOpacity or Pressable.
All interactive elements must include 'testID' (the React Native equivalent of data-testid), eg testID='login-submit-button'.
Do NOT use Expo Router unless specified; if using pure React Navigation, structure standard Tab and Stack navigators.
